title: Access the IRCC Portal for letter of acceptance verification - Canada.ca
content:
## IRCC Portal for letter of acceptance verification
The IRCC Portal for letter of acceptance (LOA) verification is for post­secondary educational institutions that need to validate LOAs submitted by students. All post-secondary designated learning institutions (DLIs) must use the IRCC Portal to validate their LOAs within the allotted time.
- Sign in to the IRCC Portal

### Get help with your account
We’ll email the primary contact at each post-secondary DLI with a unique invitation code to sign up for the portal. If you haven’t received the invitation code, you can send us an email .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
